item.title: 开源AI社区有多爱苹果电脑？
item.itunes:title: 开源AI社区有多爱苹果电脑？
item.itunes:author: 林亦LYi
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8b5k6f05p-M 清华大学研究团队的开源成果 LCM 把 AI 生成高清图像的耗时压进了一秒以内，主流的开源工具纷纷适配，AI 绘画开始朝着实时视频的方向迈进。这对整个开源 AI 作画社区可以说是打了一剂强心针，特别是计算量巨大的新一代 SDXL 模型，而在这件事上，苹果平台收获颇丰。
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8b5k6f05p-M 清华大学研究团队的开源成果 LCM 把 AI 生成高清图像的耗时压进了一秒以内，主流的开源工具纷纷适配，AI 绘画开始朝着实时视频的方向迈进。这对整个开源 AI 作画社区可以说是打了一剂强心针，特别是计算量巨大的新一代 SDXL 模型，而在这件事上，苹果平台收获颇丰。
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8b5k6f05p-M 清华大学研究团队的开源成果 LCM 把 AI 生成高清图像的耗时压进了一秒以内，主流的开源工具纷纷适配，AI 绘画开始朝着实时视频的方向迈进。这对整个开源 AI 作画社区可以说是打了一剂强心针，特别是计算量巨大的新一代 SDXL 模型，而在这件事上，苹果平台收获颇丰。

item.title: 聊天就能编程！我用GPTs做了个自己的数字化身
item.itunes:title: 聊天就能编程！我用GPTs做了个自己的数字化身
item.itunes:author: 林亦LYi
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pjKD3coLju0 分享我使用GPTs制作我自己的数字化身的经历。 数字林亦体验链接：https://chat.openai.com/g/g-FR1YebRRN-shu-zi-lin-yi
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pjKD3coLju0 分享我使用GPTs制作我自己的数字化身的经历。 数字林亦体验链接：https://chat.openai.com/g/g-FR1YebRRN-shu-zi-lin-yi
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pjKD3coLju0 分享我使用GPTs制作我自己的数字化身的经历。 数字林亦体验链接：https://chat.openai.com/g/g-FR1YebRRN-shu-zi-lin-yi

item.title: AI大模型：智能手机真的要拥有智能了？
item.itunes:title: AI大模型：智能手机真的要拥有智能了？
item.itunes:author: 林亦LYi
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JO2egYuDwmU 现阶段手机上的AI大模型干的大部分的事情都是锦上添花，但没有人可以忽视它在某些地方已经展示了颠覆式的能力。AI 可以理解而不只是识别人类的语言，本身就是一件极具想象力的事情。
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JO2egYuDwmU 现阶段手机上的AI大模型干的大部分的事情都是锦上添花，但没有人可以忽视它在某些地方已经展示了颠覆式的能力。AI 可以理解而不只是识别人类的语言，本身就是一件极具想象力的事情。
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JO2egYuDwmU 现阶段手机上的AI大模型干的大部分的事情都是锦上添花，但没有人可以忽视它在某些地方已经展示了颠覆式的能力。AI 可以理解而不只是识别人类的语言，本身就是一件极具想象力的事情。

item.title: 灵犀通信：移动信号新高度
item.itunes:title: 灵犀通信：移动信号新高度
item.itunes:author: 林亦LYi
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2N7gN9Ma80 聊聊华为的灵犀通信
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2N7gN9Ma80 聊聊华为的灵犀通信
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2N7gN9Ma80 聊聊华为的灵犀通信

item.title: 8G内存？苹果高管怎么看 M3 MacBook Pro？
item.itunes:title: 8G内存？苹果高管怎么看 M3 MacBook Pro？
item.itunes:author: 林亦LYi
item.itunes:summary:
so uh good morning Bob uh I'm a machine. learning engineer uh as well as a. content creator so I make some TI. projects of reinforcement learning and. uh uh some of the projects are based on. computer vision and I make those. projects into videos and sometimes I. make videos on um consumer product. reviews and that leads to our discussion. today yeah very good so um as a machine. learning developer the unified memory on. IPO cytic is like a beautiful breathe as. well as those uh neuron engine. so um especially those large memory. configurations uh so with chips like M2. outra and I'm actually using a Mac. Studio with M2 Ultra oh wow with with. 128 gig of memory and I could just play. whatever large large language models I. like yeah and that device just stays. quiet as a charm yeah I really like that. so the first question is like uh so the. community likes this unified memory. architecture too like there is many. open- Source projects working on maybe. running uh large language models. natively on iO cicon are you aware of. this uh emerging AI Community around. Apple silicon absolutely we think that.

Apple. silicon is perfect for many AI kind of. ml uh tasks and and capab abilities and. in fact something I think people. sometimes forget is that we've built in. Ai and ml into Apple silicon for many. many years and in fact from uh for Apple. silicon for the Mac it's been there. since day one and we just as you point. out continue to build on those. capabilities so that you as somebody. who's expert in the field can go and. extend and work at kind of the the far. edges of what what's possible and for us. to be able to take the M2 Ultra. capabilities and the unified memory. configuration and actually extend them. and bring them now into the MacBook Pro. which you can take with you anywhere we. think is going to unlock all sorts of. new capabilities and possibilities so. we're very much aware of and we're. encouraged by and we love what's. happening uh in the field um and we. really Embrace this idea that um for. example as you're describing yourself. you're not just a coder you're not just. a. modeler you're a content creator you do.

you run a business you do all these. things and Mac is designed for people. like you it's not just one thing it's we. want Mac to be your kind of Powerhouse. across your entire work and across your. entire life and that means taking away. limitations that maybe you thought. existed last year but now this year we. can do so much more so we're very. excited by the work that people like you. do um and we're inspired by it that's. why we do what we do is to give you the. capabilities to let your imagination run. free yes exactly I I want to add add on. to that like I'm making machine learning. projects and I'm using final card to do. my editing and yeah that's like a a. great workflow I I can just uh use this. one platform to do everything uh. regarding this artificial intelligence I. have this followup question so uh just. like you said Apple has been been um. doing uh machine learning features all. along and there are many machine. learning feature on Apple products like. Apple watch for example we have this. hand gesture is definitely related to. the machine learning and I just noticed. this uh weird scenario like apple seems.

to seldom use this terminology. artificial intelligence uh maybe Apple. use machine learning instead and I'm. just curious about this why is that it's. like many other companies they love this. terminology they love this concept for. marketing and artificial intelligen is. all around the place so why is IO kind. of deliberately avoiding this term I. wouldn't say that we're deliberately. avoiding it in fact we talk about the. Apple neural engine often and kind of. describe the capabilities there but at. Apple we are always focused on the end. result not the technology that's kind of. way by behind it we would rather. emphasize the things that you do and. what you can do with artificial. intelligence and machine learning as. opposed to you know talking about it in. in general and as you point out you know. double tap on the um on Apple watch. personal voice on iPhone um and then. obviously many of the things that we've. just released with M3 M3 Pro and M3 Max. are really designed to be able to enable. great experiences and we want to focus. on the experiences as opposed to the. technology itself because saying that.

you can do Ai and ml is great but it's. not nearly as important as the things. that you can do with it and that's way. we've always been focused at at Apple. let's focus on the end result and what's. great in our consumers and our you know. professionals lives as opposed to the. technology behind it cool do some real. stuff exactly exactly just showcase how. that comes to life as opposed to the. ingredients U behind it so uh we we. don't avoid Ai and ml as as terms but we. very much focus on the the end result so. I've been following along the discussion. about the new Macbook Pros yeah and uh. on social media and I'm I I just find. this one major concern and that's. related to the base model of MacBook Pro. so the the problem is about the ram and. people are saying that the 14in base. model coming with 8 GB of RAM that's not. uh meant for a pro use case what's your. thought on this discussion of the of. this 8 gig ram yeah I'm I'm glad you're. I'm glad you're asking and I'm glad that. you've actually already brought up. unified memory in the conversation. comparing our memory to other systems. memory actually is an equivalent uh.

because of the fact that we have uh such. an efficient use of memory um and we use. memory compression and we have a unified. memory architecture actually 8 GB on an. M3 uh MacBook Pro is probably analogous. to 16 GB on other systems we just happen. to be able to use it much more. efficiently um and so what I would say. is I would have people get you know come. in and uh try what they want to do on. their systems um and they will I think. we'll see incredible performance I mean. if you look at the raw uh data and if. you look at the raw capabilities of. these systems it really is it really is. phenomenal and this is a place where I. think uh people need to see beyond the. specs and actually go and look at the. capabilities and and listen to trusted. people like you who actually have used. the systems um and can be able to say. you know this is not about is it should. it be eight or some other number but. really look at the capabilities and how. efficiently we take advantage of that. memory um and I think you'll find that. nm3 system uh is is incredibly capable. and will be you know for aspiring Pros. or you know many other people will be a.

great system for them to be able to use. and obviously you know coming out at a. new lower price too it becomes even more. accessible to have that xdr display to. have the amazing camera and audio. systems to have the connectivity to have. mag safe all of that in that one system. with that much performance I'm so proud. of that it really is a phenomenal system. mhm just like when we were talking about. artificial intelligence and you just. mentioned see the end result exactly yes. I I'll I'll definitely do some maybe get. my hands on one of those entry level. model and do some real time field test. on those devices yeah please please do. it's one of those things where I think. people need to look beyond the. specification. and actually go and understand how that. technology is being used that's that's. the true the true. testb MacBook Pro. for. for. Ma. MacBook. Pro. for.

[Music]. [Music]. for. ch.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1hc1pyzT6aw

M3 MacBook Pro 深空黑首发，我蹭上热度了吗？
item.description:
so uh good morning Bob uh I'm a machine. learning engineer uh as well as a. content creator so I make some TI. projects of reinforcement learning and. uh uh some of the projects are based on. computer vision and I make those. projects into videos and sometimes I. make videos on um consumer product. reviews and that leads to our discussion. today yeah very good so um as a machine. learning developer the unified memory on. IPO cytic is like a beautiful breathe as. well as those uh neuron engine. so um especially those large memory. configurations uh so with chips like M2. outra and I'm actually using a Mac. Studio with M2 Ultra oh wow with with. 128 gig of memory and I could just play. whatever large large language models I. like yeah and that device just stays. quiet as a charm yeah I really like that. so the first question is like uh so the. community likes this unified memory. architecture too like there is many. open- Source projects working on maybe. running uh large language models. natively on iO cicon are you aware of. this uh emerging AI Community around. Apple silicon absolutely we think that.

Apple. silicon is perfect for many AI kind of. ml uh tasks and and capab abilities and. in fact something I think people. sometimes forget is that we've built in. Ai and ml into Apple silicon for many. many years and in fact from uh for Apple. silicon for the Mac it's been there. since day one and we just as you point. out continue to build on those. capabilities so that you as somebody. who's expert in the field can go and. extend and work at kind of the the far. edges of what what's possible and for us. to be able to take the M2 Ultra. capabilities and the unified memory. configuration and actually extend them. and bring them now into the MacBook Pro. which you can take with you anywhere we. think is going to unlock all sorts of. new capabilities and possibilities so. we're very much aware of and we're. encouraged by and we love what's. happening uh in the field um and we. really Embrace this idea that um for. example as you're describing yourself. you're not just a coder you're not just. a. modeler you're a content creator you do.

you run a business you do all these. things and Mac is designed for people. like you it's not just one thing it's we. want Mac to be your kind of Powerhouse. across your entire work and across your. entire life and that means taking away. limitations that maybe you thought. existed last year but now this year we. can do so much more so we're very. excited by the work that people like you. do um and we're inspired by it that's. why we do what we do is to give you the. capabilities to let your imagination run. free yes exactly I I want to add add on. to that like I'm making machine learning. projects and I'm using final card to do. my editing and yeah that's like a a. great workflow I I can just uh use this. one platform to do everything uh. regarding this artificial intelligence I. have this followup question so uh just. like you said Apple has been been um. doing uh machine learning features all. along and there are many machine. learning feature on Apple products like. Apple watch for example we have this. hand gesture is definitely related to. the machine learning and I just noticed. this uh weird scenario like apple seems.

to seldom use this terminology. artificial intelligence uh maybe Apple. use machine learning instead and I'm. just curious about this why is that it's. like many other companies they love this. terminology they love this concept for. marketing and artificial intelligen is. all around the place so why is IO kind. of deliberately avoiding this term I. wouldn't say that we're deliberately. avoiding it in fact we talk about the. Apple neural engine often and kind of. describe the capabilities there but at. Apple we are always focused on the end. result not the technology that's kind of. way by behind it we would rather. emphasize the things that you do and. what you can do with artificial. intelligence and machine learning as. opposed to you know talking about it in. in general and as you point out you know. double tap on the um on Apple watch. personal voice on iPhone um and then. obviously many of the things that we've. just released with M3 M3 Pro and M3 Max. are really designed to be able to enable. great experiences and we want to focus. on the experiences as opposed to the. technology itself because saying that.

you can do Ai and ml is great but it's. not nearly as important as the things. that you can do with it and that's way. we've always been focused at at Apple. let's focus on the end result and what's. great in our consumers and our you know. professionals lives as opposed to the. technology behind it cool do some real. stuff exactly exactly just showcase how. that comes to life as opposed to the. ingredients U behind it so uh we we. don't avoid Ai and ml as as terms but we. very much focus on the the end result so. I've been following along the discussion. about the new Macbook Pros yeah and uh. on social media and I'm I I just find. this one major concern and that's. related to the base model of MacBook Pro. so the the problem is about the ram and. people are saying that the 14in base. model coming with 8 GB of RAM that's not. uh meant for a pro use case what's your. thought on this discussion of the of. this 8 gig ram yeah I'm I'm glad you're. I'm glad you're asking and I'm glad that. you've actually already brought up. unified memory in the conversation. comparing our memory to other systems. memory actually is an equivalent uh.

because of the fact that we have uh such. an efficient use of memory um and we use. memory compression and we have a unified. memory architecture actually 8 GB on an. M3 uh MacBook Pro is probably analogous. to 16 GB on other systems we just happen. to be able to use it much more. efficiently um and so what I would say. is I would have people get you know come. in and uh try what they want to do on. their systems um and they will I think. we'll see incredible performance I mean. if you look at the raw uh data and if. you look at the raw capabilities of. these systems it really is it really is. phenomenal and this is a place where I. think uh people need to see beyond the. specs and actually go and look at the. capabilities and and listen to trusted. people like you who actually have used. the systems um and can be able to say. you know this is not about is it should. it be eight or some other number but. really look at the capabilities and how. efficiently we take advantage of that. memory um and I think you'll find that. nm3 system uh is is incredibly capable. and will be you know for aspiring Pros. or you know many other people will be a.

great system for them to be able to use. and obviously you know coming out at a. new lower price too it becomes even more. accessible to have that xdr display to. have the amazing camera and audio. systems to have the connectivity to have. mag safe all of that in that one system. with that much performance I'm so proud. of that it really is a phenomenal system. mhm just like when we were talking about. artificial intelligence and you just. mentioned see the end result exactly yes. I I'll I'll definitely do some maybe get. my hands on one of those entry level. model and do some real time field test. on those devices yeah please please do. it's one of those things where I think. people need to look beyond the. specification. and actually go and understand how that. technology is being used that's that's. the true the true. testb MacBook Pro. for. for. Ma. MacBook. Pro. for.

[Music]. [Music]. for. ch.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1hc1pyzT6aw

M3 MacBook Pro 深空黑首发，我蹭上热度了吗？
item.content:encoded:
so uh good morning Bob uh I'm a machine. learning engineer uh as well as a. content creator so I make some TI. projects of reinforcement learning and. uh uh some of the projects are based on. computer vision and I make those. projects into videos and sometimes I. make videos on um consumer product. reviews and that leads to our discussion. today yeah very good so um as a machine. learning developer the unified memory on. IPO cytic is like a beautiful breathe as. well as those uh neuron engine. so um especially those large memory. configurations uh so with chips like M2. outra and I'm actually using a Mac. Studio with M2 Ultra oh wow with with. 128 gig of memory and I could just play. whatever large large language models I. like yeah and that device just stays. quiet as a charm yeah I really like that. so the first question is like uh so the. community likes this unified memory. architecture too like there is many. open- Source projects working on maybe. running uh large language models. natively on iO cicon are you aware of. this uh emerging AI Community around. Apple silicon absolutely we think that.

Apple. silicon is perfect for many AI kind of. ml uh tasks and and capab abilities and. in fact something I think people. sometimes forget is that we've built in. Ai and ml into Apple silicon for many. many years and in fact from uh for Apple. silicon for the Mac it's been there. since day one and we just as you point. out continue to build on those. capabilities so that you as somebody. who's expert in the field can go and. extend and work at kind of the the far. edges of what what's possible and for us. to be able to take the M2 Ultra. capabilities and the unified memory. configuration and actually extend them. and bring them now into the MacBook Pro. which you can take with you anywhere we. think is going to unlock all sorts of. new capabilities and possibilities so. we're very much aware of and we're. encouraged by and we love what's. happening uh in the field um and we. really Embrace this idea that um for. example as you're describing yourself. you're not just a coder you're not just. a. modeler you're a content creator you do.

you run a business you do all these. things and Mac is designed for people. like you it's not just one thing it's we. want Mac to be your kind of Powerhouse. across your entire work and across your. entire life and that means taking away. limitations that maybe you thought. existed last year but now this year we. can do so much more so we're very. excited by the work that people like you. do um and we're inspired by it that's. why we do what we do is to give you the. capabilities to let your imagination run. free yes exactly I I want to add add on. to that like I'm making machine learning. projects and I'm using final card to do. my editing and yeah that's like a a. great workflow I I can just uh use this. one platform to do everything uh. regarding this artificial intelligence I. have this followup question so uh just. like you said Apple has been been um. doing uh machine learning features all. along and there are many machine. learning feature on Apple products like. Apple watch for example we have this. hand gesture is definitely related to. the machine learning and I just noticed. this uh weird scenario like apple seems.

to seldom use this terminology. artificial intelligence uh maybe Apple. use machine learning instead and I'm. just curious about this why is that it's. like many other companies they love this. terminology they love this concept for. marketing and artificial intelligen is. all around the place so why is IO kind. of deliberately avoiding this term I. wouldn't say that we're deliberately. avoiding it in fact we talk about the. Apple neural engine often and kind of. describe the capabilities there but at. Apple we are always focused on the end. result not the technology that's kind of. way by behind it we would rather. emphasize the things that you do and. what you can do with artificial. intelligence and machine learning as. opposed to you know talking about it in. in general and as you point out you know. double tap on the um on Apple watch. personal voice on iPhone um and then. obviously many of the things that we've. just released with M3 M3 Pro and M3 Max. are really designed to be able to enable. great experiences and we want to focus. on the experiences as opposed to the. technology itself because saying that.

you can do Ai and ml is great but it's. not nearly as important as the things. that you can do with it and that's way. we've always been focused at at Apple. let's focus on the end result and what's. great in our consumers and our you know. professionals lives as opposed to the. technology behind it cool do some real. stuff exactly exactly just showcase how. that comes to life as opposed to the. ingredients U behind it so uh we we. don't avoid Ai and ml as as terms but we. very much focus on the the end result so. I've been following along the discussion. about the new Macbook Pros yeah and uh. on social media and I'm I I just find. this one major concern and that's. related to the base model of MacBook Pro. so the the problem is about the ram and. people are saying that the 14in base. model coming with 8 GB of RAM that's not. uh meant for a pro use case what's your. thought on this discussion of the of. this 8 gig ram yeah I'm I'm glad you're. I'm glad you're asking and I'm glad that. you've actually already brought up. unified memory in the conversation. comparing our memory to other systems. memory actually is an equivalent uh.

because of the fact that we have uh such. an efficient use of memory um and we use. memory compression and we have a unified. memory architecture actually 8 GB on an. M3 uh MacBook Pro is probably analogous. to 16 GB on other systems we just happen. to be able to use it much more. efficiently um and so what I would say. is I would have people get you know come. in and uh try what they want to do on. their systems um and they will I think. we'll see incredible performance I mean. if you look at the raw uh data and if. you look at the raw capabilities of. these systems it really is it really is. phenomenal and this is a place where I. think uh people need to see beyond the. specs and actually go and look at the. capabilities and and listen to trusted. people like you who actually have used. the systems um and can be able to say. you know this is not about is it should. it be eight or some other number but. really look at the capabilities and how. efficiently we take advantage of that. memory um and I think you'll find that. nm3 system uh is is incredibly capable. and will be you know for aspiring Pros. or you know many other people will be a.

great system for them to be able to use. and obviously you know coming out at a. new lower price too it becomes even more. accessible to have that xdr display to. have the amazing camera and audio. systems to have the connectivity to have. mag safe all of that in that one system. with that much performance I'm so proud. of that it really is a phenomenal system. mhm just like when we were talking about. artificial intelligence and you just. mentioned see the end result exactly yes. I I'll I'll definitely do some maybe get. my hands on one of those entry level. model and do some real time field test. on those devices yeah please please do. it's one of those things where I think. people need to look beyond the. specification. and actually go and understand how that. technology is being used that's that's. the true the true. testb MacBook Pro. for. for. Ma. MacBook. Pro. for.

[Music]. [Music]. for. ch.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1hc1pyzT6aw

M3 MacBook Pro 深空黑首发，我蹭上热度了吗？
